# AppWindowMac

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="AppWindowMac icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="AppWindowMac" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 24&quot; fill=&quot;none&quot; stroke=&quot;currentColor&quot; stroke-width=&quot;2&quot; stroke-linecap=&quot;round&quot; stroke-linejoin=&quot;round&quot;&gt;&lt;rect height=&quot;16&quot; rx=&quot;2&quot; width=&quot;20&quot; x=&quot;2&quot; ## Tags
application, menu bar, pane, preferences, macos, osx, executable

## Categories
layout, design, development, files

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/app-window-mac)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::AppWindowMac;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        AppWindowMac { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
